skills.name: kleros-skills
skills.description: Root index — routes agents to the right Kleros skill for decentralized justice, dispute resolution, Curate registries, and IPFS uploads

skills.name: kleros-ipfs-upload
skills.description: Upload files to IPFS through the Kleros x402 payment gateway ($0.01 USDC on Base mainnet)

skills.name: kleros-curate
skills.description: Operate Kleros Curate token-curated registries — submit, challenge, appeal, deploy (Light Curate, Stake Curate, Scout)

skills.name: openclaw-skill
skills.description: OpenClaw integration for Kleros skills — install and manage skills via the clawhub CLI

skills.name: kleros-feedback
skills.description: Report problems, confusion, coverage gaps, or praise about any Kleros skill directly to maintainers via a structured GitHub issue (agent-feedback label)
